status_amendment_RUN-150: RETRACTED: earlier 'CONVERGED' verdict was on a 13-of-45 flow sample (29% coverage). Re-running as PARTIAL_SAMPLE. A proper convergence claim requires scoring across all 45 product flows (48 minus 3 INTERNAL_ONLY adapters). New rounds V-R4..V-Rn will execute at full coverage before any convergence claim is made.
purpose: Per-round visible-quality scoring against the rendered PNG set. Measures against the 11-axis rubric from VISUAL-REEXAMINATION-PLAN.md applied to images read with the Read tool.
measurement_method: For each round, capture the full 60-PNG baseline (21 cells x 3 viewports: mobile/tablet/desktop) via client/e2e/visual-audit-baseline.spec.ts. Read a representative sample of 5 cells (marketplace mobile tenant-user, ads-platform desktop + mobile + he-RTL platform-admin, user-registration mobile anonymous). Score each against: UX-P1 Accessibility, UX-P2 Touch, UX-P4 Style, UX-P5 Responsive, UX-P6 Typography, UX-P8 Forms, UX-P9 Navigation, G grammar fit, R reference parity, H human language, S state legibility. Offence weights: BLOCKER=3, MAJOR=2, MINOR=1.

rounds.label: V-R0 baseline — 21 cells × 3 viewports captured; 5 scored
V-R1 — three systemic fixes: AppShell mobile-responsive, URL → i18n sync, api/client snake_case error envelope
fixes: S1 AppShell: sidebar becomes a slide-over drawer below md (w-56 hidden md:flex + hamburger button in topbar + min-h-[44px] nav items + main ms-0 md:ms-56)
S2 useURLLanguageSync hook in AppShell: ?lang=he triggers i18n.changeLanguage; existing languageChanged handler flips document.dir
S3 api/client.ts extracts human message from error_message / errorMessage / message / error.message with generic fallback; unwraps both isSuccess and is_success DataProcessResult envelopes on 2xx
rounds.newly_surfaced_offences: Hebrew layout unlock revealed hardcoded English page content (h1, subtitle, column labels) — tracked as V-R3+ per-flow i18n work. This is an expected visibility shift, not a regression.

rounds.label: V-R2 — four targeted fixes on V-R1 residuals
fixes: Marketplace one-state rule: error OR empty, never stacked; friendly error copy + reference-platform empty pattern with primary CTA
Banner locale JSON (en + he + fr): 'MONO_MODEL_CALIBRATION' → 'Training data will use fallback calibration until real keys are configured'
Real SSO brand SVGs on RegistrationPage (Google 4-color G / GitHub Octicon / Microsoft 4-square), 44px min-h touch targets
Tenant identifier leak 'system' implicitly resolved by marketplace error copy rewrite

rounds.label: V-R3 — convergence check: recapture + rescore same 5 cells
rounds.residual_2_offences: Both in the same class: per-flow hardcoded English strings that don't translate when ?lang=he (ads-platform page h1 + subtitle + column labels). Systemic fixes exhausted; further reduction requires per-flow i18n wiring which scales linearly with flow count and is properly tracked per-cell in ROUND-2-COVERAGE-MATRIX.json.

residual: H Page content hardcoded English on he-RTL: 2 (across the ads-platform sample; extrapolated ~40-80 across the whole product; per-flow work)
